name: Notifications - Email Triage - Slack

options.systemMessage: You are an email triage assistant for a busy professional. Identify emails needing immediate attention: urgent requests, deadlines, action items, or important decisions. An email is priority if it contains keywords like urgent, ASAP, action required, deadline, approval needed, important, high priority, or explicitly asks the recipient to do something. Be concise and accurate.

parameters.jsonSchemaExample: {"is_priority": true, "priority_type": "urgent", "summary": "CFO requests Q3 budget approval by Friday EOD", "action_items": ["Review Q3 budget document", "Send approval by Friday EOD"]}

description: Polls Gmail every 15 minutes for unread emails, uses AI to classify urgency and extract action items, then sends a Slack alert for any priority or action-required emails.
